{{CargoRelic
|name=Anesthetic Dart Watch
|class_id=21375
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Invented by Dr. Agasa,This is a small anesthetic gun that resembles an ordinary watch, capable of silently firing anesthetic needles. For close-range targets, it typically induces unconsciousness three to five seconds after being hit. Additionally, the watch features a flashlight function and includes satellite communication capabilities and a port, allowing for satellite communication and serving as a storage medium for content.
|fame=41
|art=36
|fth=53
|civ=40
|tech=73
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
